g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Nginx forward to the dedup service?')
sendPrompt('Which HTTP methods are excluded from deduplication?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis SETNX check work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when Redis is unavailable?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between fail-open and fail-closed?')
sendPrompt('How does SETNX determine if a request is a duplicate?')
sendPrompt('What does the 409 response body look like?')
sendPrompt('What header does the dedup service set on an allowed response?')
sendPrompt('What does Nginx do with the X-Accel-Redirect response?')
